proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with `braf_v600e` equal to 1 have more negative `dependency_BRAF` scores than cell lines with `braf_v600e` equal to 0.
Cell lines with `egfr_amplification` equal to 1 have more negative `dependency_EGFR` scores than cell lines with `egfr_amplification` equal to 0.
Cell lines with `erbb2_amplification` equal to 1 have more negative `dependency_ERBB2` scores than cell lines with `erbb2_amplification` equal to 0.
Cell lines with `kras_mutation` equal to 1 have more negative `dependency_KRAS` scores than cell lines with `kras_mutation` equal to 0.

analyses.code: Welch comparison of dependency_BRAF by braf_v600e status.
analyses.result_summary: `dependency_BRAF` mean was -0.8047 in `braf_v600e` lines versus -0.2495 in other lines; the signed difference was -0.5552.

analyses.code: Welch comparison of dependency_EGFR by egfr_amplification status.
analyses.result_summary: `dependency_EGFR` mean was -0.6010 in `egfr_amplification` lines versus -0.2524 in other lines; the signed difference was -0.3486.

analyses.code: Welch comparison of dependency_ERBB2 by erbb2_amplification status.
analyses.result_summary: `dependency_ERBB2` mean was -0.6856 in `erbb2_amplification` lines versus -0.2535 in other lines; the signed difference was -0.4321.

analyses.code: Welch comparison of dependency_KRAS by kras_mutation status.
analyses.result_summary: `dependency_KRAS` mean was -0.5594 in `kras_mutation` lines versus -0.2520 in other lines; the signed difference was -0.3075.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with `nf1_loss` equal to 1 have more negative `dependency_RIT1` scores than cell lines with `nf1_loss` equal to 0.
Cell lines in the top quartile of `growth_rate_doublings_per_day` have more negative `dependency_POLR2A` scores than slower-growing cell lines.
Cell lines in the top quartile of `growth_rate_doublings_per_day` have more negative `dependency_TMED10` scores than slower-growing cell lines.
Cell lines in the top quartile of `growth_rate_doublings_per_day` have more negative `dependency_DHX9` scores than slower-growing cell lines.

analyses.code: Welch comparison of dependency_RIT1 by nf1_loss status.
analyses.result_summary: `dependency_RIT1` mean was -0.3527 in `nf1_loss` lines versus -0.2572 in other lines; the signed difference was -0.0955.

analyses.code: Welch comparison of dependency_POLR2A for growth_rate_doublings_per_day >= 0.964 versus the remainder.
analyses.result_summary: `dependency_POLR2A` mean was -0.4972 in high-growth lines versus -0.3928 in the remainder; the signed difference was -0.1043.

analyses.code: Welch comparison of dependency_TMED10 for growth_rate_doublings_per_day >= 0.964 versus the remainder.
analyses.result_summary: `dependency_TMED10` mean was -0.2816 in high-growth lines versus -0.2447 in the remainder; the signed difference was -0.0369.

analyses.code: Welch comparison of dependency_DHX9 for growth_rate_doublings_per_day >= 0.964 versus the remainder.
analyses.result_summary: `dependency_DHX9` mean was -0.3614 in high-growth lines versus -0.3243 in the remainder; the signed difference was -0.0371.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with `myc_amplification` equal to 1 have more negative `dependency_RPL11` scores than cell lines with `myc_amplification` equal to 0.
Cell lines in the top quartile of `copy_number_8q24` have more negative `dependency_RPL11` scores than other cell lines.
Cell lines with `myc_amplification` equal to 1 have more negative `dependency_DHX9` scores than cell lines with `myc_amplification` equal to 0.

analyses.code: Welch comparison of dependency_RPL11 by myc_amplification status.
analyses.result_summary: `dependency_RPL11` mean was -0.3614 in `myc_amplification` lines versus -0.2523 in other lines; the signed difference was -0.1091.

analyses.code: Welch comparison of dependency_RPL11 for copy_number_8q24 top quartile versus the remainder.
analyses.result_summary: `dependency_RPL11` mean was -0.3440 in high-8q24-copy lines versus -0.2452 in other lines; the signed difference was -0.0988.

analyses.code: Welch comparison of dependency_DHX9 by myc_amplification status.
analyses.result_summary: `dependency_DHX9` mean was -0.3491 in `myc_amplification` lines versus -0.3307 in other lines; the signed difference was -0.0184.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with `lineage` equal to `colorectal` have more negative `dependency_KIF18A` scores than non-colorectal cell lines.

Within cell lines with `lineage` equal to `colorectal`, cell lines with `apc_mutation` equal to 1 have more negative `dependency_KIF18A` scores than colorectal cell lines with `apc_mutation` equal to 0.

Within colorectal, APC-mutant cell lines, cell lines with `wnt_activity_score` in the top quartile have more negative `dependency_KIF18A` scores than colorectal, APC-mutant lines with lower `wnt_activity_score`.

analyses.code: Welch comparison of dependency_KIF18A in colorectal versus non-colorectal cell lines.
analyses.result_summary: `dependency_KIF18A` mean was -0.7204 in colorectal lines versus -0.2524 in non-colorectal lines; the signed difference was -0.4680.

analyses.code: Welch comparison of dependency_KIF18A within colorectal lines by apc_mutation status.
analyses.result_summary: Within colorectal lines, `dependency_KIF18A` mean was -0.9425 in APC-mutant lines versus -0.2592 in APC-wildtype lines; the signed difference was -0.6833.

analyses.code: Welch comparison of dependency_KIF18A within colorectal APC-mutant lines by wnt_activity_score >= 0.819.
analyses.result_summary: Within colorectal APC-mutant lines, `dependency_KIF18A` mean was -1.1119 when `wnt_activity_score` was in the top quartile versus -0.2733 otherwise; the signed difference was -0.8386.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Within colorectal, APC-mutant, high-WNT cell lines, cell lines with `smad4_loss` equal to 0 have more negative `dependency_KIF18A` scores than otherwise similar lines with `smad4_loss` equal to 1.

The complete subgroup `lineage` equal to `colorectal`, `apc_mutation` equal to 1, top-quartile `wnt_activity_score`, and `smad4_loss` equal to 0 has more negative `dependency_KIF18A` scores than all other cell lines.

analyses.code: Welch comparison within colorectal APC-mutant high-WNT lines by smad4_loss status.
analyses.result_summary: Within colorectal APC-mutant high-WNT lines, `dependency_KIF18A` mean was -1.2990 when `smad4_loss` was 0 versus -0.2557 when `smad4_loss` was 1; the signed difference was -1.0433.

analyses.code: Welch comparison of the complete colorectal/APC-mutant/high-WNT/SMAD4-intact subgroup versus the remainder.
analyses.result_summary: `dependency_KIF18A` mean was -1.2990 in the complete subgroup versus -0.2530 in all other lines; the signed difference was -1.0460.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The negative effect of `braf_v600e` on `dependency_BRAF` is stronger in cell lines with `lineage` equal to `skin` than in non-skin cell lines.
The negative effect of `egfr_amplification` on `dependency_EGFR` is stronger in cell lines with `lineage` equal to `brain` than in non-brain cell lines.
The negative effect of `erbb2_amplification` on `dependency_ERBB2` is stronger in cell lines with `lineage_subtype` equal to `her2_enriched` than in other cell lines.
The negative effect of `kras_mutation` on `dependency_KRAS` is stronger in cell lines with `lineage` equal to `pancreatic` than in non-pancreatic cell lines.

analyses.code: Difference-in-differences for braf_v600e effect on dependency_BRAF by skin lineage.
analyses.result_summary: The `braf_v600e` effect was -0.5640 in skin lines and -0.5514 outside skin; the interaction difference was -0.0126 and was not significant.

analyses.code: Difference-in-differences for egfr_amplification effect on dependency_EGFR by brain lineage.
analyses.result_summary: The `egfr_amplification` effect was -0.3642 in brain lines and -0.3455 outside brain; the interaction difference was -0.0187 and was not significant.

analyses.code: Difference-in-differences for erbb2_amplification effect on dependency_ERBB2 by her2_enriched subtype.
analyses.result_summary: The `erbb2_amplification` effect was -0.4973 in HER2-enriched lines and -0.4302 in other lines; the interaction difference was -0.0671.

analyses.code: Difference-in-differences for kras_mutation effect on dependency_KRAS by pancreatic lineage.
analyses.result_summary: The `kras_mutation` effect was -0.3102 in pancreatic lines and -0.3074 outside pancreatic lines; the interaction difference was -0.0028 and was not significant.

proposed_hypotheses.text: A systematic predicate search will identify a `dependency_BRAF` subgroup defined by `braf_v600e` equal to 1, top-quartile `growth_rate_doublings_per_day`, and `pik3ca_mutation` equal to 0 with more negative `dependency_BRAF` scores than all other cell lines.

A systematic predicate search will identify a `dependency_EGFR` subgroup defined by `egfr_amplification` equal to 1, top-quartile `growth_rate_doublings_per_day`, and `culture_type` equal to `adherent` with more negative `dependency_EGFR` scores than all other cell lines.

A systematic predicate search will identify a `dependency_ERBB2` subgroup defined by `erbb2_amplification` equal to 1, top-quartile `cas9_activity_score`, and `nf1_loss` equal to 0 with more negative `dependency_ERBB2` scores than all other cell lines.

A systematic predicate search will identify a `dependency_KRAS` subgroup defined by `kras_mutation` equal to 1, top-quartile `growth_rate_doublings_per_day`, and bottom-quartile `wnt_activity_score` with more negative `dependency_KRAS` scores than all other cell lines.

A systematic predicate search will identify a `dependency_RIT1` subgroup defined by `nf1_loss` equal to 1, bottom-quartile `rnaseq_MYC_log2_tpm`, and `culture_type` equal to `adherent` with more negative `dependency_RIT1` scores than all other cell lines.

analyses.code: Greedy systematic dependency-heterogeneity search over categorical, binary, and quartile-thresholded predicates.
analyses.result_summary: The selected `dependency_BRAF` subgroup had mean -0.8351 versus -0.2992 in the remainder; the signed difference was -0.5358.

analyses.code: Greedy systematic dependency-heterogeneity search over categorical, binary, and quartile-thresholded predicates.
analyses.result_summary: The selected `dependency_EGFR` subgroup had mean -0.6421 versus -0.2738 in the remainder; the signed difference was -0.3683.

analyses.code: Greedy systematic dependency-heterogeneity search over categorical, binary, and quartile-thresholded predicates.
analyses.result_summary: The selected `dependency_ERBB2` subgroup had mean -0.7140 versus -0.2866 in the remainder; the signed difference was -0.4275.

analyses.code: Greedy systematic dependency-heterogeneity search over categorical, binary, and quartile-thresholded predicates.
analyses.result_summary: The selected `dependency_KRAS` subgroup had mean -0.6296 versus -0.3206 in the remainder; the signed difference was -0.3091.

analyses.code: Greedy systematic dependency-heterogeneity search over categorical, binary, and quartile-thresholded predicates.
analyses.result_summary: The selected `dependency_RIT1` subgroup had mean -0.3871 versus -0.2637 in the remainder; the signed difference was -0.1234.

proposed_hypotheses.text: A systematic predicate search will identify a `dependency_KIF18A` subgroup defined by `lineage` equal to `colorectal`, `apc_mutation` equal to 1, and top-quartile `wnt_activity_score` with more negative `dependency_KIF18A` scores than all other cell lines.

A systematic predicate search will identify a weak `dependency_TMED10` subgroup defined by top-quartile `growth_rate_doublings_per_day`, `lineage` equal to `prostate`, and `rb1_loss` equal to 0 with more negative `dependency_TMED10` scores than all other cell lines.

A systematic predicate search will identify a `dependency_DHX9` subgroup defined by top-quartile `growth_rate_doublings_per_day`, top-quartile `rnaseq_MYC_log2_tpm`, and bottom-quartile `mutation_burden` with more negative `dependency_DHX9` scores than all other cell lines.

A systematic predicate search will identify a `dependency_POLR2A` subgroup defined by top-quartile `growth_rate_doublings_per_day`, `lineage_subtype` equal to `adenocarcinoma`, and `media_serum_pct` equal to 10 with more negative `dependency_POLR2A` scores than all other cell lines.

A systematic predicate search will identify a `dependency_RPL11` subgroup defined by `myc_amplification` equal to 1, top-quartile `growth_rate_doublings_per_day`, and top-quartile `stemness_score` with more negative `dependency_RPL11` scores than all other cell lines.

analyses.code: Greedy systematic dependency-heterogeneity search over categorical, binary, and quartile-thresholded predicates.
analyses.result_summary: The selected `dependency_KIF18A` subgroup had mean -1.1119 versus -0.2530 in the remainder; the signed difference was -0.8589.

analyses.code: Greedy systematic dependency-heterogeneity search over categorical, binary, and quartile-thresholded predicates.
analyses.result_summary: The selected `dependency_TMED10` subgroup had mean -0.3181 versus -0.2533 in the remainder; the signed difference was -0.0649.

analyses.code: Greedy systematic dependency-heterogeneity search over categorical, binary, and quartile-thresholded predicates.
analyses.result_summary: The selected `dependency_DHX9` subgroup had mean -0.4080 versus -0.3324 in the remainder; the signed difference was -0.0756.

analyses.code: Greedy systematic dependency-heterogeneity search over categorical, binary, and quartile-thresholded predicates.
analyses.result_summary: The selected `dependency_POLR2A` subgroup had mean -0.5275 versus -0.4172 in the remainder; the signed difference was -0.1103.

analyses.code: Greedy systematic dependency-heterogeneity search over categorical, binary, and quartile-thresholded predicates.
analyses.result_summary: The selected `dependency_RPL11` subgroup had mean -0.4193 versus -0.2681 in the remainder; the signed difference was -0.1512.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The `dependency_KIF18A` subgroup `lineage` equal to `colorectal`, `apc_mutation` equal to 1, top-quartile `wnt_activity_score`, and `smad4_loss` equal to 0 is stronger than the three-predicate KIF18A subgroup because `smad4_loss` equal to 1 suppresses the dependency.
For `dependency_ERBB2`, `lineage_subtype` equal to `her2_enriched` is a modest but significant amplifier of the negative `erbb2_amplification` effect.

For `dependency_BRAF`, `dependency_EGFR`, and `dependency_KRAS`, the primary driver variables explain most of the dependency signal and lineage modifiers do not add statistically significant heterogeneity.

analyses.code: Compared SMAD4-intact versus SMAD4-loss lines inside the colorectal APC-mutant high-WNT KIF18A subgroup.
analyses.result_summary: Adding `smad4_loss` equal to 0 sharpened the KIF18A subgroup: SMAD4-intact lines averaged -1.2990, while SMAD4-loss lines averaged -0.2557.

analyses.code: Difference-in-differences for ERBB2 amplification by HER2-enriched subtype.
analyses.result_summary: HER2-enriched subtype strengthened the `erbb2_amplification` effect by -0.0671 on the `dependency_ERBB2` scale.

analyses.code: Difference-in-differences for BRAF, EGFR, and KRAS driver effects by the most plausible lineage modifiers.
analyses.result_summary: Skin did not significantly modify the BRAF V600E effect (p=0.288), brain did not significantly modify the EGFR amplification effect (p=0.222), and pancreatic lineage did not significantly modify the KRAS mutation effect (p=0.794).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The final best-supported `dependency_BRAF` pattern is that `braf_v600e` equal to 1, rather than a lineage-specific subgroup, produces more negative `dependency_BRAF` scores.
The final best-supported `dependency_EGFR` pattern is that `egfr_amplification` equal to 1, rather than brain-lineage restriction, produces more negative `dependency_EGFR` scores.

The final best-supported `dependency_ERBB2` pattern is that `erbb2_amplification` equal to 1 produces more negative `dependency_ERBB2` scores, with a modest additional strengthening in `lineage_subtype` equal to `her2_enriched`.
The final best-supported `dependency_KRAS` pattern is that `kras_mutation` equal to 1 produces more negative `dependency_KRAS` scores without a pancreatic-lineage-specific interaction.
The final best-supported `dependency_RIT1` pattern is that `nf1_loss` equal to 1 produces more negative `dependency_RIT1` scores.

The final best-supported `dependency_KIF18A` pattern is the complete subgroup `lineage` equal to `colorectal`, `apc_mutation` equal to 1, top-quartile `wnt_activity_score`, and `smad4_loss` equal to 0, which has markedly more negative `dependency_KIF18A` scores.

The final best-supported `dependency_TMED10` pattern is a weak high-proliferation association: top-quartile `growth_rate_doublings_per_day` has more negative `dependency_TMED10` scores, with no strong molecular driver detected.
The final best-supported `dependency_DHX9` pattern is that high `growth_rate_doublings_per_day` and high `rnaseq_MYC_log2_tpm` together mark cell lines with more negative `dependency_DHX9` scores.
The final best-supported `dependency_POLR2A` pattern is that top-quartile `growth_rate_doublings_per_day` has more negative `dependency_POLR2A` scores.
The final best-supported `dependency_RPL11` pattern is that `myc_amplification` equal to 1 and high `copy_number_8q24` mark cell lines with more negative `dependency_RPL11` scores.

analyses.code: Final synthesis using main effect and interaction tests.
analyses.result_summary: `braf_v600e` was strongly associated with more negative `dependency_BRAF` (effect -0.5552, p<1e-300), while the skin-lineage interaction was not significant.

analyses.code: Final synthesis using main effect and interaction tests.
analyses.result_summary: `egfr_amplification` was strongly associated with more negative `dependency_EGFR` (effect -0.3486, p<1e-300), while the brain-lineage interaction was not significant.

analyses.code: Final synthesis using main effect and interaction tests.
analyses.result_summary: `erbb2_amplification` was strongly associated with more negative `dependency_ERBB2` (effect -0.4321, p<1e-300), and HER2-enriched subtype modestly strengthened the effect (interaction -0.0671, p=0.0398).

analyses.code: Final synthesis using main effect and interaction tests.
analyses.result_summary: `kras_mutation` was strongly associated with more negative `dependency_KRAS` (effect -0.3075, p<1e-300), while the pancreatic-lineage interaction was not significant.

analyses.code: Final synthesis using main effect tests.
analyses.result_summary: `nf1_loss` was associated with more negative `dependency_RIT1` (effect -0.0955, p<1e-300).

analyses.code: Final synthesis of KIF18A subgroup refinement.
analyses.result_summary: The complete colorectal/APC-mutant/high-WNT/SMAD4-intact subgroup had mean `dependency_KIF18A` -1.2990 versus -0.2530 in all other lines; the signed difference was -1.0460.

analyses.code: Final synthesis using growth-rate and systematic-search results.
analyses.result_summary: Top-quartile growth rate was associated with slightly more negative `dependency_TMED10` (effect -0.0369, p<1e-300); the strongest searched subgroup remained modest (effect -0.0649).

analyses.code: Final synthesis using MYC and growth-rate subgroup search.
analyses.result_summary: The high-growth/high-MYC/low-mutation-burden subgroup had mean `dependency_DHX9` -0.4080 versus -0.3324 in other lines; the signed difference was -0.0756.

analyses.code: Final synthesis using growth-rate tests.
analyses.result_summary: Top-quartile growth rate was associated with more negative `dependency_POLR2A` (effect -0.1043, p<1e-300).

analyses.code: Final synthesis using MYC-amplification and 8q24-copy tests.
analyses.result_summary: `myc_amplification` was associated with more negative `dependency_RPL11` (effect -0.1091, p<1e-300), consistent with the high-8q24-copy signal (effect -0.0988).
